campaignsPage.pickRowHint: Click a campaign in the table to see KPIs and ad sets below.

campaignsPage.pageSizeHint: Server-side pagination — page changes are fast.
campaignsPage.columnsHint: Pick metrics to show in the table (Ads Manager style).

auth.loginSubtitle: Use email and password to access the platform. Connect Meta later in Settings.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to explore the MVP. Connect Meta when you need ads and metrics.
auth.name: Name
auth.facebookHandoffBody: You’ll be redirected to Meta to confirm your identity. Traffic AI never sees your Facebook password.
auth.facebookHandoffPermission1: Name and profile photo to personalize your account
auth.facebookHandoffSecure: Encrypted connection — revocable in Facebook settings
auth.facebookDialogPreview: Continue as [your account] — Traffic AI will receive name and photo
auth.facebookHandoffPageSubtitle: On the next step you confirm your identity on Meta.
auth.facebookHandoffSecure: Official Meta OAuth · we never store your Facebook password
auth.metaConnectLaterHint: Meta Business can be connected later in Settings.
auth.heroTitle: Scale campaigns with data, not guesswork.
auth.heroSubtitle: Creative ranking, live metrics, and Meta Business connection — all in one place for you and your team.
auth.selling2: Connect Meta Business in a few steps
auth.selling3: Secure login with Google or Facebook
auth.selling4: Alerts, reports, and automations for your operation
auth.trustLine: Built for agencies and managers running multiple Meta clients.
auth.loginFacebookHint: Automatically imports your Business Managers, ad accounts, and pages.
auth.loginScopes: With Facebook you grant {adsRead} and {adsManagement} and link your Meta account.
auth.metaOptionalHint: Optional at signup — you can also connect later in Settings.
auth.metaNotConfiguredHint: Facebook disabled: set META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET in .env (see Settings).

errors.ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Account suspended for non-payment. Contact support.

sync.hintMemberNoWorkspaceMeta: You are a workspace member: sync uses the administrator's Meta connection. Ask them to connect or reconnect Facebook in Settings.
sync.hintAdminReconnectMeta: Connect or reconnect Facebook in Settings to sync ad accounts.
sync.hintMemberAccountAccess: As a member you don't need to connect your own Meta — but the administrator must still have access to the linked ad account in Ads Manager.
sync.noAccounts: No ad accounts linked to this client. Link a Meta ad account in client settings.

welcome.title: While you were away
welcome.subtitle: Important events since your last logout.

client.onboardingIntro: Traffic AI mirrors what you already use in Meta. Think of it like this:
client.onboardingClient: Client = agency contract (e.g. Clínica Bella). Groups accounts, goals, and campaigns for that business.
client.onboardingAdAccount: Ad account = ad spend wallet in Meta, inside a Business Manager. Link the accounts for this client here.
client.onboardingCampaign: Campaign → Ad set → Ad = structure inside the account. You manage this under Campaigns.
client.onboardingSteps: On this client page, do in order: (1) link ad account(s) → (2) save publishing (page + URL) → (3) goals & alerts → (4) sync.
client.adAccountsHint: Select Meta ad accounts for this client. Filter by Business Manager to find the right account.
client.clientBmHint: Only ad accounts and pages from this BM are shown. Save after changing.
client.noAccounts: No linked accounts — sync with Meta.
client.aiQuickHint: Review alerts and execute suggestions in this client's Action center.
client.goalsHint: Automatic alerts when limits are exceeded (after sync).
client.deleteConfirm: Remove «{name}» from the platform? This deletes linked accounts, goals, alerts, and local history. It does not change anything in Meta — only in Traffic AI.
client.deleteHint: Use when a contract ends and the client removes your access in Ads Manager.
client.cannotDeleteDefault: The system Default client cannot be deleted.
client.publishHint: Facebook Page and destination URL used when creating campaigns for this client.
client.publishIncomplete: Page and URL are missing — campaigns cannot be published.
client.agencyBrainHint: Market segment used for Agency Brain patterns and recommendations.
client.nicheHint: E.g. clinic, e-commerce, info product. Influences starter insights in DNA and AI.
client.audiencesManageHint: To create lookalikes, pixel, engagement and more, go to

aiCenter.title: AI Center
aiCenter.subtitle: Suggestions based on metrics and context
aiCenter.chatHint: E.g. redo ignoring ad set X and be less aggressive on budget
aiCenter.debugHint: Session, period and structured JSON validation.

ads.title: Ad Creator
ads.subtitle: Full Meta campaign (paused for safety)

ads.publishTargetHint: Page, Instagram and pixel for this ad account. With a single option, it's auto-selected.
ads.audienceHint: Targeting for this ad. Left blank, uses the client defaults.
ads.noClients: No clients yet. Create one in the Clients hub.
ads.publishNotReady: This client does not have a Meta Page and URL configured yet.

ads.sidebarSubtitle: Creates campaign + ad set + ad (full structure, paused).
ads.hierarchyHint: Campaign → Ad set → Ad. This flow publishes the full structure at once.

campaignCreator.title: Campaign creator
campaignCreator.tabAnalyzeHint: Detailed analysis is available after you publish the campaign.
campaignCreator.objectiveModalHint: Choose a campaign objective. You can adjust budget, audience, and creatives in the next steps.
campaignCreator.objective_traffic_hint: Send people to a website or app.
campaignCreator.objective_leads_hint: Collect contacts via form or website.
campaignCreator.budgetCboHint: Meta distributes budget across ad sets.
campaignCreator.budgetAboHint: Budget set on this ad set.
campaignCreator.specialCategoriesHint: Declare if ads relate to credit, employment, housing, or social/political issues.
campaignCreator.detailedTargetingHint: Each additional group narrows the audience (AND). Top-level interests are ignored when groups exist.
campaignCreator.savedAudiencesHint: Select custom audiences, lookalikes, or lists already created in Meta.
campaignCreator.savedAudiencesNeedAccount: Select client and ad account in the Campaign step to load audiences.
campaignCreator.savedAudiencesEmpty: No audiences found for this account. Create them in Ads Manager or the Audiences page.
campaignCreator.aiAudienceHint: Describe your ideal profile; AI builds a persona preview first, then searches Meta after you review it.

campaignCreator.aiAudienceBusinessPh: E.g. aesthetic clinic focused on botox and facial harmonization
campaignCreator.aiAudienceProfile: Who do you want to reach?

campaignCreator.aiAudienceBehaviorsPh: E.g. shop online, research treatments, follow beauty influencers
campaignCreator.aiAudienceLifestylePh: E.g. travel often, premium brands, office workers
campaignCreator.aiAudienceLifestyleHint: Income and job titles become correlated interests (travel, brands, hobbies) — not literal income fields.
campaignCreator.aiAudienceIncludeCustomHint: Pixel, engagement, or lookalike audiences are merged into the generated saved audience.
campaignCreator.aiAudiencePreviewHint: Review the persona before searching Meta targeting.
campaignCreator.aiAudienceFailed: Could not generate audience. Try again.
campaignCreator.aiAudienceSavedLocal: Audience saved to the Traffic AI library (Meta no longer allows creating saved audiences via API).
campaignCreator.aiAudienceApproveApply: Approve, save & apply to ad set
campaignCreator.audienceOrDivider: or define audience by location and interests

campaignCreator.identityInstagramEmpty: No Instagram linked to this account — the ad can still run with the Facebook Page only.

campaignCreator.messageTemplateSectionHint: Saved in Traffic AI and sent to Meta when you publish the ad.
campaignCreator.messageTemplateSaved: Template saved to the client library.
campaignCreator.messageIcebreakersHint: Shown as quick-reply buttons in WhatsApp.

campaignCreator.addAnotherAdHint: Choose what to keep from the current ad when duplicating.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, team, integrations and workspace preferences
settings.profileSubtitle: Plan, billing, account, team and integrations
settings.whitelabelHint: Brand name and logo shown across the workspace.
settings.passwordOAuthOnly: You sign in with Google or Facebook — there is no local password to change.
settings.integrationsPageSubtitle: Connect ad platforms and channels to your workspace.
settings.integrationWhatsappDesc: Deliver alerts and report summaries via WhatsApp.
settings.integrationGoogleAdsDesc: Sync campaigns and metrics from Google Ads.
settings.webhooksSubtitle: Receive critical alerts and scheduled report events at external URLs.
settings.webhookAlertHint: JSON POST when a critical alert is created (Slack, Discord, n8n, etc.).
settings.webhookReportHint: JSON POST after each automated report run.
settings.agencyBrainPrivacyHint: Anonymously contribute niche patterns to enrich market insights (no identifiable client data).
settings.agencyBrainNicheShareOptIn: Share approved learnings anonymously by niche
settings.publishHint: Each client uses its own Facebook Page and destination URL when creating campaigns.
settings.publishPerClient: Set each client's Facebook Page and destination URL under Clients hub → client → Meta publishing.
settings.integrationsHint: Global app credentials (OAuth and fallbacks). Prefer page/URL on each client profile.
settings.metaHint: Sign in with Facebook or reconnect here to refresh Business Managers, accounts, and pages.
settings.workspaceMetaHint: A single Meta account powers data for the whole workspace. Other users signing in won't change this connection.
settings.workspaceMetaClaim: Use my account as the workspace connection
settings.workspaceMetaDisconnectConfirm: This removes the official Meta connection and deletes the workspace's stored tokens. Continue?
settings.workspaceMetaClaimNeedsToken: Connect your Meta account above before taking over the workspace connection.
settings.workspaceMetaClaimed: You are now the owner of the workspace Meta connection.
settings.workspaceMetaDisconnected: Workspace Meta connection removed. Connect your account and take over the connection.
settings.workspaceMetaActionFailed: Could not update the workspace connection.
settings.metaSetupRequired: Configure the Meta app in .env before connecting.
settings.metaErrorMissingApp: Meta app not configured. Set META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET, then restart the server.
settings.metaErrorProfileMismatch: The Meta account selected differs from your current session. Sign out and sign in with the correct account, or reconnect using the same linked Meta account.
settings.demoDataHint: Removes MVP placeholder clients (Odonto Plus, Loja Fitness, Clínica Bella) and Meta «demo» ad accounts. Does not delete real clients you created.
settings.demoDataNames: e.g. Odonto Plus, Loja Fitness, Clínica Bella
settings.demoDataConfirm: Permanently remove demo clients and demo ad accounts from this workspace?
settings.demoDataDone: Removed {clients} demo client(s) and {accounts} demo ad account(s).
settings.resetDataHint: Deletes ALL clients, accounts and the Meta connection (tokens, inventory, creatives, metrics, alerts). Use it to redo the connection from scratch. Irreversible.
settings.resetDataKeeps: Keeps: the workspace, your login and the team. It does not delete the app screens or structure.
settings.resetDataConfirm: Permanently delete all clients and Meta data in this workspace? This cannot be undone.
settings.resetDataDone: Done. {total} record(s) deleted. Now reconnect Meta from scratch.
settings.metaSetupTitle: Set up Meta app (required to connect)
settings.metaSetupIntro: The "Invalid App ID" error means META_APP_ID is empty in your .env file.
settings.metaSetupStep2: Under Facebook Login → Settings, add this valid OAuth redirect URI:
settings.metaSetupStep3: Copy App ID and App Secret to .env:
settings.metaSetupStep4: META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET (non-empty). Page and ad URL are set per client in the hub — META_PAGE_ID / META_LINK_URL in .env are optional (fallback).
settings.metaSetupStep5: Request ads_read, ads_management, business_management, and pages_show_list. In Development mode, add yourself as a tester. business_management may require App Review in production.
settings.metaSetupRestart: After saving .env, stop pnpm dev (Ctrl+C) and start it again.
settings.teamHint: Invite colleagues to share the same clients and campaigns.
settings.teamInviteSent: Invite created. Copy the link below.
settings.teamEmptyMembers: No members yet. Invite your team to collaborate.

invite.title: Workspace invite
invite.subtitle: Accept the invite to join the team.
invite.missingTokenHint: If you came from Meta login, ask the admin for a new link or open the full URL with ?token=…
invite.preview: Invitation to «{workspace}» (sent to {email}). Any authenticated Meta account can accept this link.
invite.loginRequired: Sign in with Meta to accept the invite.
invite.accepted: Invite accepted. You can use the workspace now.

connectPlatform.title: Connect ad platform
connectPlatform.subtitle: Start by selecting your primary ad platform — connect the others later.

connectPlatform.selling4: Clear permissions — you control what you authorize

brainInsights.learningsFeedSubtitle: What the Brain has consolidated from Meta Ads, similar accounts, and market signals.
brainInsights.hypothesesFeedSubtitle: Tests derived from learnings — what is being validated now.
brainInsights.feedHowItWorks: The Brain cross-references Meta Ads data, similar agency accounts, market scans, and hypothesis results to consolidate each learning.
brainInsights.refineHint: Scans Meta Ad Library, detects campaign patterns, and runs AI analysis.
brainInsights.refineNoPoints: No AI points available. Upgrade or wait for monthly renewal.
brainInsights.refineSuccess: Research refined: {ads} market ad(s), {patterns} pattern(s) detected, {learnings} AI learning(s), {market} market insight(s).
brainInsights.refineNoResults: No new signals found in this run.
brainInsights.refineError: Failed to refine research. Try again.
brainInsights.researchLogsEmpty: No research logged yet. Use Refine research to get started.
brainInsights.updateStatusHint: Update status on the detail page.
brainInsights.whyBelievesTitle: Why does the Brain believe this?
brainInsights.noRelatedHypotheses: No hypotheses linked to this learning.
brainInsights.updateStatusDescription: Mark the test outcome to consolidate the learning.

agencyBrain.title: Agency Brain
agencyBrain.labsClientHint: Research and experiments are per client.
agencyBrain.labsSelectClient: Select a client above to see running research and history.
agencyBrain.labsSelectClientFirst: Select a client before creating research.
agencyBrain.selectClientHint: Select the client to load data for this section.
agencyBrain.noClients: No clients yet. Create a client to use Agency Brain.
agencyBrain.aiNoKey: AI not configured. Set GEMINI_API_KEY on the server.
agencyBrain.aiRateLimit: AI rate limit reached. Try again in 1–2 minutes.
agencyBrain.aiServiceError: AI service temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
agencyBrain.aiParseError: Could not parse AI response. Try again.
agencyBrain.aiSchemaError: AI returned an unexpected format. Try again.
agencyBrain.aiNoResults: No new items were generated. Items may have been rejected or already exist.
agencyBrain.aiFeatureNotIncluded: AI analysis is not included in your plan.
agencyBrain.aiSubscriptionBlocked: Subscription inactive. Activate to use AI analysis.
agencyBrain.aiErrorLearnings: Failed to analyze learnings with AI.
agencyBrain.aiErrorActions: Failed to generate suggestions with AI.
agencyBrain.brainValidationHint: Only approved learnings with confidence ≥ 50 or rule/AI detection count.
agencyBrain.learningXpPotential: Possible points if approved with quality
agencyBrain.hypothesesEmpty: No hypotheses yet. Detect patterns or use AI.
agencyBrain.hypothesesErrorAi: Failed to generate hypotheses with AI.
agencyBrain.dnaEmpty: DNA not derived yet. Rebuild from learnings.
agencyBrain.nicheInsightsHint: Set the client niche in client settings to personalize these insights.
agencyBrain.nicheInsightsAggregated: Includes aggregated patterns from other agencies (anonymous opt-in).
agencyBrain.timelineOutcomePending: Metrics comparison available in {days} day(s) (7-day window).
agencyBrain.labsSubtitle: Deep research with Scientists in the background (10–30 min).
agencyBrain.labsHeroSubtitle: Specialized scientists investigate market, audience, and opportunities in the background — under your command.
agencyBrain.labsHeroScientistsAvailable: {count, plural, one {# scientist in the lab} other {# scientists in the lab}}
agencyBrain.labsHeroRunning: {count, plural, one {# research running} other {# research running}}
agencyBrain.labsHeroTotal: {count, plural, one {# experiment total} other {# experiments total}}
agencyBrain.labsSquadHint: Choose who joins this experiment. None are pre-selected.
agencyBrain.labsModalHint: Define the research and pick your scientist team.
agencyBrain.labsEmpty: Use «New experiment» in the hero to build your scientist team.
agencyBrain.labsSectionCompletedHint: Dossiers ready to review — soon you'll reuse them without a new research run.
agencyBrain.labsKnowledgeHint: Coming soon: dossier library to reuse insights without running new research.
agencyBrain.labsComingSoonBody: AI scientist experiments are still in internal testing. The Agency Brain MVP focuses on Learnings, Hypotheses, DNA, Action center, Action plans, and Timeline.
agencyBrain.labsCreateSuccessMock: Research started (demo mode). Scientists are working…
agencyBrain.labsFormHint: What your Scientists will investigate in this run.
agencyBrain.labsFieldObjectivePlaceholder: What do you want to learn? Audience, competitors, copy angles…
agencyBrain.labsNicheHint: Loaded from the client profile — adjust if needed.
agencyBrain.labsScientistsHint: Select one or more Scientists. Each adds credits to the research.
agencyBrain.labsScientistsIntro: Each Scientist covers one market angle. Pick what fits your goal — the final dossier brings it together.
agencyBrain.labsScientistsCount: {count, plural, one {# scientist selected} other {# scientists selected}}
agencyBrain.labsRunDurationHint: Research runs in the background (10–30 min).
agencyBrain.labsScientistCompetitorDesc: A snapshot of who shows up for your audience.
agencyBrain.labsScientistConsumerDesc: Profile and motivations behind the purchase.
agencyBrain.labsScientistTrendDesc: Whether the niche is heating up, steady, or cooling.
agencyBrain.labsScientistHypothesisDesc: Suggested paths to validate from the findings.
agencyBrain.labsScientistConfidenceDesc: What to act on first in the dossier.
agencyBrain.experimentsSubtitle: A/B tests with baseline projection from campaign history.
agencyBrain.experimentsForecastInsufficient: Insufficient history for forecast (min. 7 days with spend).
agencyBrain.chatEmpty: Ask about this client's operational memory.
agencyBrain.chatMeetingHint: Structured answers for client meetings: summary, highlights, concerns, and next steps.
agencyBrain.chatMeetingPlaceholder: E.g. prepare a monthly performance summary…
agencyBrain.approveLowConfidence: Confidence below 50/100 — review or wait for more data before approving.
agencyBrain.learningsToolbarHint: Detect patterns or create learnings manually
agencyBrain.subtitle: Operational memory for this client: creatives, audiences, offers, and decisions that worked or failed.
agencyBrain.comingSoonMvpHint: Use Learnings, Hypotheses, DNA, and Action center while we prepare this area.
agencyBrain.comingSoon_timeline_body: Unified timeline of campaigns, learnings, and client decisions.
agencyBrain.comingSoon_action-plans_body: Multi-step sequences built from Action center suggestions.
agencyBrain.comingSoon_chat_body: Talk to client memory using DNA, learnings, and recent metrics.
agencyBrain.comingSoon_labs_body: Deep research with AI scientists — available after internal validation.
agencyBrain.mvp_learnings_hint: Insights from client, agency, and market — validate what enters memory.
agencyBrain.mvp_learnings_step1: Sync campaigns and click Detect patterns or Analyze with AI.
agencyBrain.mvp_learnings_step2: Review and approve insights — only then they enter memory.
agencyBrain.mvp_learnings_step3: Confirmed hypotheses can become learnings; DNA updates automatically.
agencyBrain.mvp_hypotheses_hint: Patterns not yet proven. Confirm, reject, or promote to learning when validated.
agencyBrain.mvp_hypotheses_step1: Use Detect rules for automatic patterns from metrics.
agencyBrain.mvp_hypotheses_step2: Use AI suggest for client-contextualized hypotheses.
agencyBrain.mvp_hypotheses_step3: Confirm and promote — becomes a learning in DNA and feeds suggestions.
agencyBrain.mvp_dna_hint: Structured summary of what works and what doesn't by audience, creative, offer, and copy.
agencyBrain.mvp_dna_step1: Approve learnings in the Learnings tab.
agencyBrain.mvp_dna_step2: Click Rebuild DNA to derive the client profile.
agencyBrain.mvp_dna_step3: Use DNA as context for suggestions and future AI analysis.
agencyBrain.mvp_suggestions_hint: Critical alerts and actionable suggestions based on memory and recent metrics.
agencyBrain.learningLensAllHint: All active learnings for this client.
agencyBrain.learningLensPendingHint: Detected insights waiting for your approval.
agencyBrain.learningLensHighImpactHint: Learnings marked as high impact on campaigns.
agencyBrain.learningLensCreativeHint: Creatives, formats, and visual elements that performed.
agencyBrain.learningLensGeneralHint: General learnings that don't fit another category.
agencyBrain.learningScopeClientHint: Approved memory and suggestions for this client.
agencyBrain.learningScopeAgencyHint: Cross-learning: what works across all clients in your account.
agencyBrain.learningScopeMarketHint: Niche patterns and external trends — basic market scientist.
agencyBrain.learningScopeAgencyBanner: Approved learnings from all clients. Read-only — use the client badge to open their memory.
agencyBrain.learningScopeMarketBanner: Scan the Meta Ad Library for real niche patterns. AI synthesis only summarizes data already collected.
agencyBrain.learningScopeMarketNeedsClient: Select a client above to contextualize the market niche.
agencyBrain.learningScopeMarketScientistHint: Scans the Meta Ad Library, extracts patterns algorithmically, and optionally synthesizes with AI — without inventing ads.
agencyBrain.learningScopeAgencyEmpty: When you approve learnings on clients, they appear here for the whole agency.
agencyBrain.learningScopeAgencyEmptyStep: Go back to the Client layer and approve relevant insights.
agencyBrain.marketInsightNoNiche: Set the client's niche to see market patterns.
agencyBrain.marketInsightScanSuccess: {count} ad(s) analyzed in the Meta Ad Library.
agencyBrain.marketInsightScanError: Error scanning the Meta Ad Library.
agencyBrain.marketInsightSynthesizeNeedsScan: Scan the Meta Ad Library before synthesizing.
agencyBrain.marketInsightEmpty: Consult the market with AI or wait for niche patterns.
agencyBrain.marketInsightEmptyScan: Click Scan Meta Ad Library or register competitors in the client DNA.
agencyBrain.marketCoveragePartial: Partial Meta API coverage ({count} ad(s)). Register competitors with Page ID in DNA to improve.
agencyBrain.marketCoverageEmpty: No ads found ({count}). Meta API has limited coverage outside EU/UK — register competitors in DNA.
agencyBrain.marketLabsBridgeHint: When Labs opens, these patterns will feed competitor experiments.
agencyBrain.marketLabsBridgeTooltip: Coming soon — will use this market memory when Labs is available.
agencyBrain.marketHeroSubtitle: Scan the Meta Ad Library, discover real competitor patterns, and turn signals into opportunities.
agencyBrain.marketHeroNoScanYet: No analysis yet — scan the Meta Ad Library to get started.
agencyBrain.insightWhySaturation: May indicate creative fatigue or audience saturation.
agencyBrain.insightWhyEfficiency: Spend without return may signal funnel or offer issues.
agencyBrain.insightWhyCtr: May indicate creative fatigue or audience misalignment.
agencyBrain.insightWhyRoas: ROAS variation directly impacts campaign profitability.
agencyBrain.insightWhyCreative: Creatives influence CTR, CPM, and traffic quality.
agencyBrain.insightWhyAudience: Wrong targeting wastes budget and distorts metrics.
agencyBrain.insightWhyOffer: The value proposition must resonate with audience and timing.
agencyBrain.insightWhyBudget: Budget allocation affects scale and efficiency.
agencyBrain.insightWhyGeneral: Relevant pattern to optimize client performance.
agencyBrain.insightActionRefreshCreative: Refresh creatives or test new hooks.
agencyBrain.insightActionReviewFunnel: Review funnel, landing page, and conversion tracking.
agencyBrain.insightActionScale: Consider scaling budget on efficient campaigns.
agencyBrain.insightActionCreativeVariant: Create a new creative variant or review targeting.
agencyBrain.insightActionAudience: Test a new audience or refine segmentation.
agencyBrain.insightActionOffer: Review offer, pricing, or value proposition.
agencyBrain.insightActionBudget: Reallocate budget across campaigns or ad sets.
agencyBrain.insightActionReview: Investigate affected campaigns and validate with more data.
agencyBrain.brainFeedSubtitle: Discovery feed — client, agency, and market in one place.
agencyBrain.marketContextHint: Used by the mini-scientist in Learnings > Market to scan the Meta Ad Library.
agencyBrain.marketInsightAiNoResults: No new market insights were generated.
agencyBrain.empty: No learnings yet. Create one manually or detect automatic patterns.

actionCenter.title: Action center
actionCenter.subtitle: Critical alerts, pending suggestions, and decision history in one place.

creativePatterns.title: Creative patterns
creativePatterns.subtitle: Winners, fatigue, and high-spend low-result creatives.
creativePatterns.empty: No patterns detected in this period. Sync with Meta.

creativeMemory.title: Creative Memory
creativeMemory.subtitle: Learnings and actionable suggestions per client — operational memory and next steps.
creativeMemory.noClients: No clients yet. Create a client to use creative memory.
creativeMemory.aiNoKey: AI not configured. Set GEMINI_API_KEY on the server.
creativeMemory.aiRateLimit: AI rate limit reached. Try again in 1–2 minutes.
creativeMemory.aiServiceError: AI service temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
creativeMemory.aiParseError: Could not parse AI response. Try again.
creativeMemory.aiSchemaError: AI returned an unexpected format. Try again.
creativeMemory.aiNoResults: No new items were generated. Items may have been rejected or already exist.
creativeMemory.aiFeatureNotIncluded: AI analysis is not included in your plan.
creativeMemory.aiSubscriptionBlocked: Subscription inactive. Activate to use AI analysis.
creativeMemory.aiErrorLearnings: Failed to analyze learnings with AI.
creativeMemory.aiErrorActions: Failed to generate suggestions with AI.

clientSuggestions.subtitle: Actionable suggestions based on client memory and recent metrics.
clientSuggestions.empty: No suggestions yet. Generate from memory and metrics.

clientOverview.noCampaigns: No active campaigns in the period.

campaignTypes.label: Type
campaignTypes.createTypeHint: Set a name and the metrics this type should highlight.
campaignTypes.validation: Enter a name and at least one metric.

campaignTableLayout.columnsHint: Choose metrics shown in campaign tables. The view is saved to your profile.
campaignTableLayout.columnsPageHint: Define a type (name + metrics). Campaigns classified with that type appear in their own group on the list — same as the type selector in the table.
campaignTableLayout.typeNameHint: This name labels the group on the campaigns list (e.g. Low Ticket Products).
campaignTableLayout.deleteTypeConfirm: Delete this type? Associated campaigns will revert to General.

billingPage.plansSubtitle: Start with 7 days free, then pick the plan that fits your operation.
billingPage.plansFootnote: Prices in Brazilian reais (BRL). Pay via PIX or card with tax invoice.
billingPage.plansFootnoteBr: Prices in Brazilian reais (BRL). Pay via PIX or card with tax invoice.
billingPage.yearlyPixHint: Up to {percent}% off with PIX on checkout
billingPage.freeTrialHint: No credit card required to start
billingPage.limitsSubtitle: Workspace usage compared to your plan.
billingPage.checkoutSubtitle: Review your plan and complete payment below.
billingPage.checkoutNfHint: After payment confirmation, your invoice is issued automatically via Asaas.
billingPage.checkoutSecureHint: Secure payment via Asaas. Card data is tokenized at the gateway.
billingPage.checkoutCardSecureHint: Your card is tokenized by Asaas — we never store card number or CVV.
billingPage.cardProcessingHint: Wait for card confirmation. This may take a few seconds.
billingPage.cardFailedHint: Could not confirm payment. Try again or use another card.
billingPage.cancelContactAdmin: Contact your account administrator to cancel renewal.
billingPage.cancelAdminOnly: Only administrators can cancel the subscription.
billingPage.checkoutCardHint: Visa, Mastercard and other major cards accepted.
billingPage.stripeRedirectHint: You will be redirected to Stripe's secure checkout. Taxes calculated based on your country.
billingPage.checkoutStripeTaxHint: VAT, sales tax and GST are calculated automatically on Stripe Checkout.
billingPage.checkoutStripeSecureHint: Payment processed securely by Stripe (hosted Checkout).
billingPage.name: Full name
billingPage.pixHint: Complete payment in your banking app. Confirmation is automatic.
billingPage.pixScanHint: Open your bank app and scan the code
billingPage.pixStep2: Scan the QR or paste the PIX code
billingPage.pixStep3: Confirm payment — we activate your subscription right away
billingPage.portalSubtitle: Manage your plan, payments and tax invoices.
billingPage.planTabHintBody: Check limits, invoices, and events in the other tabs.
billingPage.upgradePromoDesc: Subscribe now and save {percent}% paying with PIX at checkout.
billingPage.pixPayInDrawer: Pay with PIX to activate your subscription
billingPage.pixExpiredBody: This code can no longer be used. Generate a new payment to continue.
billingPage.cancelConfirm: Cancel subscription at end of current period?
billingPage.statusPastDue: Payment overdue — please settle to avoid suspension.
billingPage.modalPastDueBody: We detected an overdue payment. Settle it to keep full access.
billingPage.modalSuspendedBody: Your subscription was suspended. You can view data but actions are blocked.
billingPage.modalUpgradeBody: Unlock more clients, auto sync and AI with a paid plan.
billingPage.addonsSubtitle: Add clients, ad accounts or AI without changing plans
billingPage.addonsPageSubtitle: Expand your operation by buying only what you need — no plan upgrade required.
billingPage.addonRequestSent: Request received! Our team will contact you to activate the pack.

billingAdmin.title: Pending refunds
billingAdmin.refundsSubtitle: Approve or reject customer refund requests.
billingAdmin.plansSubtitle: Edit prices, limits and availability. Changes apply to the plans page and checkout.
billingAdmin.forbiddenHint: Platform admins only (platformRole=admin in DB or BILLING_ADMIN_EMAILS).
billingAdmin.financeSubtitle: Revenue and balances per provider (Asaas BRL and Stripe USD).
billingAdmin.couponsSubtitle: Create coupons for tests and promos. Final amount is always computed server-side.
billingAdmin.sectionPricesBrlHint: Used in Brazilian checkout. If empty, the system falls back to the USD amount.
billingAdmin.sectionNavHint: Check the menus this plan can access. Unchecked = locked in the sidebar.
billingAdmin.sectionAgencyBrainHint: Check the modules enabled for this plan.
billingAdmin.createPlanHint: New plans start inactive — enable after setting prices and limits.
billingAdmin.createPlanDefaults: Initial limits match Free; prices are zero until you edit the plan.
billingAdmin.usersSubtitle: Change plans, addons, and profile data for any platform account.
billingAdmin.usersSearchPlaceholder: Search by email, name, or workspace…
billingAdmin.usersAddonsHint: Bonuses added on top of plan limits (e.g. +5 clients on Agency).

creativesPerf.title: Creative performance
creativesPerf.subtitle: Top creatives by name and where they are used
creativesPerf.errorTimeout: The request timed out. Please try again in a moment.
creativesPerf.empty: No creatives with data for this client in the period.

creativesPerf.copyEmpty: No copy available for this creative.
creativesPerf.usageEmpty: Could not locate where this creative is used.
creativesPerf.accessWarningTitle: Missing permission on one or more Meta accounts
creativesPerf.accessWarningBody: Reconnect Meta granting access (ads_read/ads_management) so creatives from these accounts show up:
creativesPerf.accessWarningPartialData: Some creatives loaded from other accounts. The accounts below need attention.
creativesPerf.accessWarningNotGranted: This ad account was not granted during Meta connection. Reconnect and select it in the asset dialog.
creativesPerf.accessWarningNoToken: No workspace member has a valid Meta token for this account.
creativesPerf.accessWarningTokenExpired: The Meta token expired. Reconnect your account.
creativesPerf.accessWarningRateLimit: Meta API rate limit reached. Try again in a few minutes.
creativesPerf.accessActionInviteColleague: Ask a colleague with access to connect Meta in the workspace
creativesPerf.dataCached: Cached data — click Refresh for live data
creativesPerf.showMoreZero: Show creatives with no spend in the period ({n})
creativesPerf.promisingDesc: Spent little but already performing well — worth watching and considering scaling.
